claims: The WPHX-312.56 WP_Http::browser_redirect_compatibility candidate now uses the WPHX compiler-emitted grouped original-path class-wp-http.php public shell.

The generated shell preserves the public static browser_redirect_compatibility($location, $headers, $data, &$options, $original) ABI and delegates the 302 decision to the Haxe helper before mutating the caller's native PHP options array.
The previous copied or runner-patched temporary public PHP shell is no longer the authority for the browser_redirect_compatibility boundary.
non_claims: This receipt does not claim whole-file WP_Http ownership.
This receipt does not claim WP_Http::request ownership, live HTTP transport behavior, installed WordPress distribution behavior, broader redirect helper ownership, or generated Requests ownership.
